_notes: Copy this file to DeployConfig.json and fill in your environment settings.
DeployConfig.json is excluded from the repository - this example file is the template.
ShareRoot: UNC path to your deployment share.
DriveLetter: Drive letter to map the share to in WinPE (Z: recommended).
ImagesSubfolder: Subfolder under ShareRoot containing WIM files.
DriversSubfolder: Subfolder under ShareRoot containing driver ZIPs.
AppTitle: Displayed in the title bar and window caption.
AppVersion: Displayed in the status bar.
BuildLabel: Displayed in the title bar next to the app title.
DefaultDomainPrefix: Pre-fills the username field (e.g. DOMAIN\).
Timezone: Must match a valid Windows timezone name (run tzutil /l for list).
DefaultImageIndex: 2 for Dell Image Assist WIMs, 1 for standard WIMs.
DefaultTargetDisk: Physical disk number to image (0 = first disk).
AutoRebootSeconds: Countdown before auto-reboot after deployment.
LogoPath: Optional PNG logo file path in WinPE (leave empty to disable).
IconPath: Optional ICO file path in WinPE (leave empty to disable).
AccentColorR/G/B: RGB values for the accent color used on buttons.
